name: Weekly Scorecard
description: Phase 0 – Generates a weekly business scorecard. Trigger: cron every Monday at 8 AM. Fetches total deals and pipeline from Zoho API, cash balance from Xero API, inserts metrics into canonical_metric, posts to Glance webhook, and logs to workflow_logs.
notes: Placeholder – build this workflow in the n8n UI and export the JSON here. See Phase 0 Build Manual section 6.3 for details.
